description: Case style: Round, Plastic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Dial style: White dial with text and silver hands Strap style: Rubber strap with tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Quartz movement of time display, screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistant up to 30 meters Warranty: 2 year for analog watches
